name: lark-cli-codex-app
description: Codex plugin for Lark and Feishu powered by lark-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Use Lark and Feishu from Codex with compact CLI output.
interface.longDescription: Manage calendars, messages, docs, contacts, mail, minutes, sheets, and bitables from Codex using the token-efficient lark CLI and bundled skills.
defaultPrompt: Check my Lark calendar for this week and highlight conflicts.
Find the last messages in our release chat and summarize decisions.
Open a Lark document as markdown and pull out the action items.
